# bleepr

Sound effect generator CLI for UI, games, and transitions. Generates WAV files from templates or randomized params using three synth engines: bfxr (chiptune), footsteppr (footsteps), and transfxr (whooshes).

## Entry point

cli.js — single-file Node.js CLI, no build step. Run directly: `node cli.js`

## Key files

- cli.js : CLI entry point, arg parsing, banner, generation pipeline
- js/synths/SynthBase.js : base class for all synths (params, templates)
- js/synths/Bfxr.js : main chiptune synth with hardcoded templates
- js/synths/Footsteppr.js : footstep sound synth
- js/synths/Transfxr.js : filter-sweep transition synth for UI whooshes
- js/audio/Bfxr_DSP.js : core DSP generator for Bfxr sounds
- js/audio/puredata.js : Pure Data signal processing primitives
- js/audio/riffwave.js : WAV file writing

## Template system

Templates are either:
- Hardcoded as `generate_<name>()` methods on a synth class (e.g. Bfxr.generate_pickup_coin)
- Loaded from `.bcol` JSON files in `templates/<Synth>/` via insert_templates.js

## CLI flags

-h (help), -l (list templates), -a (about template), -s (synth), -o (output),
--random, --seed, -p (params string), -f (param file), --dump-params

## No framework

Zero dependencies for the CLI core. Uses Node.js built-ins only.
ANSIs for color. The old web UI (bin/, css/, img/, compile.js) was stripped.
